Component.Name: MatlTranViewTypeDescGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SL.SLMatlTrans.MtCodeListSp( V(lsm1_MatlTranViewTypeDescGridCol) PROPERTIES(MatlTranViewTypeDesc) DISPLAY(1)DISTINCT() ORDERBY(MatlTranViewTypeDesc))

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR MaterialTransactions, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLMatltrans( FILTERPERM(RefType=isnull(FV(RefTypeVar), RefType)) ORDERBY(TransNum DESC) LOCKMODE(Row) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'push the original value back onto the form
For Each sCode As String In sMtCodes
sNewFilter = If(iCount = 0, String.Empty, sNewFilter + " OR ") + GenerateFilterByMtCode(sCode)
Private Function GenerateFilterByMtCode(sMtCode As String) As String
If InStr("BGHLP", sMtCode) > 0 And Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(sMtCode) Then
Return "(TransType = N'" & Mid(sMtCode, 1, 1) & "' AND RefType = N'" & Mid(sMtCode, 2, 1) & "')"
Return "(TransType = N'C' AND Loc IS NOT NULL AND Qty < 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'C' AND Loc IS NOT NULL AND Qty >= 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'C' AND Loc IS NULL AND RefType = N'K')"
Return "(TransType = N'C' AND Loc IS NULL AND RefType = N'S')"
Return "(TransType = N'C' AND Loc IS NULL AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S'))"
Return "(TransType = N'F' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S'))"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType = N'K' AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType = N'K' AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType = N'S' AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType = N'S' AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType NOT IN (N'C', N'K', N'S', N'W') AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'I' AND RefType NOT IN (N'C', N'K', N'S', N'W') AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType = N'K' AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType = N'K' AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType = N'S' AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType = N'S' AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S', N'W') AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'N' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S', N'W') AND Qty != 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'R' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S') AND Qty < 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'R' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S') AND Qty > 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'R' AND RefType NOT IN (N'K', N'S') AND Qty = 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'W' AND RefType = N'O' AND Qty > 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'W' AND RefType = N'O' AND Qty <= 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'W' AND RefType = N'P' AND Qty < 0)"
Return "(TransType = N'W' AND RefType = N'P' AND Qty >= 0)"
